title: Dispatch artifact validation from file path to schema name
context: Multiple Quorum artifacts share the same persistence flow but each must validate against a different JSON schema.
content: Centralize persistence behind a save_artifact helper that maps artifact paths to schema files, formats field-level validation errors, writes JSON/YAML consistently, and special-cases memory/*.json plus 07-trace.json. This keeps CLI commands thin and makes new artifact write paths reuse one enforcement point.
anti_patterns: Avoided duplicating per-command schema validation logic in each CLI entrypoint because drift between write paths would weaken enforcement.
